name: Coal Road
short_description: This is a horizontal shooter game. The story takes place in a city infected by "coal", where most people have become coal zombies. When the government learned of the great changes in the city, it sent two elite soldiers to investigate the situation.
detailed_description:
The English version of the game is mechanically translated

Game Description

The game is a horizontal shooting game with 5 levels. In the levels, you can get various guns to defeat the enemy, as well as vehicles suitable for the scene to help you pass the level. Each level will add several new enemies, and there is a powerful boss at the end of the level.

Plot Description

A city is infected with something called "coal", and all the infected bodies will gradually change from the head to "coal" and become aggressive. By the time the news reached the outside world, almost all of the city had been infected. The government sealed off the city and sent two elite fighters into the city to investigate. The two fighters start from the very outskirts of the city and work their way deeper into the city, eventually finding the source in the center of the city.

Discussion Group

Since this game is made by me alone, I may encounter various problems, if there are any problems, please add QQ group: 417085785
